name: marvin
description: The complete Marvin toolkit as one MCP server under a single /marvin: slash prefix — core dev tools (commit, debug, adr, changelog, readme, migration-plan, explain, docs-search, handoff), the pr-* pull-request lifecycle (pr-create, pr-review, pr-resolve, pr-merge), the task-* spec pipeline, sec-* security scanners, and a kanban-* task tracker.
